title: Vanilla Parts
description: Turn your ordinary blocks into multiparts and place many inside one block!
body: **Vanilla Parts** lets you turn ordinary vanilla blocks like slabs, carpets and torches into [LibMultiPart][libmultipart]-compatible multiparts -- multiple parts within one block space! Currently includes support for (2.0.0): - Slabs (including slabs from other mods) - Carpets - Levers - Buttons - Torches - Fences - Cakes [libmultipart]: https://github.com/AlexIIL/LibMultiPart
